name: Remittance Disclosure and Corridor Cost
outcome: Gated two-step chain for Reg E remittance disclosure and corridor cost benchmarking. Step 1 computes the required CFPB Reg E subpart B (12 CFR 1005.31/1005.32) disclosure fields and emits estimate_permissible. Gate on /estimate_permissible: if true (12 CFR 1005.32 estimated disclosure applies), the chain ends at the disclosure receipt -- no corridor benchmarking required. If false (exact disclosure, default path), Step 2 runs compare_corridor_cost to benchmark total cost (fee % + FX margin %) against the World Bank RPW Q1 2026 snapshot and SDG 10.c 3% target. ZERO PII BY CONSTRUCTION.
